title: satureja ericifolia subsp. canariensis
intro: Satureja ericifolia subsp. canariensis, also known as Canarian savory, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Canarian savory include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Canarian savory can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are commonly used to support overall well-being.
